title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the Ombudsmen office and defining its functions, powers, and procedures for investigating complaints against public service agencies, state enterprises, and related organizations. Sets out complaint handling processes, investigation protocols, and accountability mechanisms for public sector bodies.
